findings.astroboy1183: No findings; cleanly registers local agents and finance-tracker in fleet.
findings.common: No findings; tidy single-responsibility agentlib module.
findings.cricket-scores: No findings; three-way signal (dead/quiet/scores) cleanly implemented.
findings.daily-review: Three style/risk findings: subprocess stderr not logged, UTC vs IST timezone parsing in grace window, jitter rationale undocumented.
findings.eng-blogs: Style: feed errors conflate timeout/network with HTTP status; separate in failure list.
findings.finance-tracker: Style: comment needed to explain why empty secret requires `or` fallback.
findings.fleet: No findings; devcontainer and clone script coherent.
findings.housekeeper: Risk: vault stale-days check uses redundant AND when dirty-and-old alone should alert.
findings.mail-digest: Risk: vip_block() assumes e['vip'] always present; style: _LINK_RE pattern undocumented.
findings.markets-brief: Risk: query1/query2 fallback conflates different exceptions; log both for diagnostics.
findings.news-briefing: No findings; freshness filter and link validation solid.
findings.papers-digest: Style: evenly-spaced sampling logic needs intent comment.
findings.release-radar: Style: _parse_published() normalization fragile to `+0000` format; use regex or rstrip.
findings.repo-review: Style: CODE_EXT/DOC_EXT split good, but comment should explain what is deliberately excluded (JSON, lockfiles).
findings.study-coach: Risk: case-insensitive topic match uses substring instead of exact comparison; style: resolve_topic() docstring says 'force' but doesn't overwrite existing headers.
findings.tech-news: No findings; Industry feed added and link validation in place.
findings.weather-report: Style: is_severe() function promised in README but plumbing not visible in diff.

findings.news-briefing: Freshness filter and link validation solid.
findings.papers-digest: Evenly-spaced sampling logic lacks intent comment.
findings.repo-review: CODE_EXT/DOC_EXT exclusion heuristic needs comment on deliberately-excluded types.

findings.weather-report: is_severe() function tested but definition not shown in diff; confirm presence.

databricksrepo.notes: databricksrepo remains completely empty (README-only) for a second consecutive spotlight cycle; both prior fixes (real README, stub notebook) were ignored, now escalated. New findings shift focus to governance gaps: no license, no .gitignore, no CI/CD or Databricks Asset Bundle scaffolding, and a non-descriptive repo name. Recommended first fix: write a real purpose-driven README plus a databricks.yml bundle skeleton to convert this from a dead placeholder into an actual project shell.
